rule-approver-cannot-approve-own-request.description: The requester cannot approve their own request at any level

rule-timeout-escalation.description: Approval request not decided within deadline escalates to next level or rejects

rule-rejection-ends-flow.description: A rejection at any level immediately ends the approval flow

rule-delegation-chain-max-2.description: Delegation cannot exceed 2 hops to prevent infinite loops
